variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list clearly misses the major overhead row 'Distribution costs', which is present in the statement and should be included. No explicit single SG&A subtotal exists, so selected the main above-EBIT overhead buckets: Distribution costs, Administrative expenses, R&D, and Other operating expenses. Excluded depreciation/amortization subcomponents and balancing rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution costs
